postmark.Subject: Refinance — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

New file for Marcus Webb. This is a first mortgage refinance — we're refinancing the existing Royal Bank of Canada mortgage into a new first-position mortgage. Property at 1142 Tory Road NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 2K8.

Loan amount $390,000. Property value $650,000 (appraisal attached), so we're at 60% LTV. Existing Royal Bank of Canada balance is about $225k — payout statement attached.

Full package attached.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
